headline: Session 39 made mobile General Manager decisions fully actionable inline, closing the phone loop from pressure to choice to consequence.

items.title: mobile-inline-gm-decision-choices
items.evidence: Mobile pending GM decisions now render option buttons and submit through the existing gmDecisionChoice consequence path.

items.title: latest-audit-follow-through
items.evidence: Innovation pack rechecked the Session 39 audit against live code and found no remaining shippable feature candidate.

followUps.title: email-forwarding receipt
followUps.evidence: Obtain real received-message proof for football@playfranchisearchitect.com before any SPARKED flip.

blockers.title: launch/SPARKED
blockers.evidence: Launch remains blocked on real email forwarding/copying proof and current live origin/routing evidence.

honestyLedger.title: new-backend-decision-engine
honestyLedger.evidence: Rejected on evidence because /api/gm-decision and /api/advance-week gmDecisionChoice already own the source-of-truth path.

honestyLedger.title: missing local closeout helpers
honestyLedger.evidence: render-state-vector, compute-entropy, append-genome-snapshot, and repo-local scan-secrets are not vendored in this public repo; Studio Ops scanner is used for pre-push.
